channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iowa GOP governor nominee recounts viral clash that put Obama on the spot at 2009 town hall
item.description: Iowa GOP gubernatorial nominee Zach Lahn's 2009 question that stumped Obama on Obamacare's public option has gone viral after his primary victory.

item.title: Trump Jr. Talks Crypto, Geopolitics at Swiss Business Forum
item.description: Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of President Donald Trump and a senior executive of the Trump family business, extolled the virtues of cryptocurrenc...

item.title: Tobacco Giants Pressed on White House Ties
item.description: Six U.S. senators, including Democrat whip Dick Durbin and Elizabeth Warren, wrote public letters to tobacco giants Reynolds American and Altria on Th...

item.title: Dozen GOP rebels fail to permanently kill Trump's controversial $2B fund
item.description: Senate Republicans voted against permanently killing Trump's $2 billion anti-weaponization fund despite criticism, as Sen. Tillis' amendment failed.
